roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:16 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT ALSO ORDERS MR, BECHELLI TO ENROLL IN AND COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF OUTPATIENT TREATMENT THROUGH GLIDE MEMORIAL CHURCH'S RECOVERY SERVICES, IN ORDER TO ENSURE COMPLIANCE, HE WILL BE REQUIRED TO CARRY A  DAY PLANNER  ONWHICH HE MUST GET THE SIGNATURE OF THE STAFF MEMBER OVERSEEING THE OUTPATIENT TREATMENT, ON EACH DAY HE ATTENDS, HE MUSTBRING THIS  DAY PLANNER  TO EACH MEETING WITH HIS PAROLE AGENT, MISSING ANOUTPATIENT SESSION, MISSING ASCHEDULED MEETING WITH HIS PAROLE AGENT, OR FAILING TO BRING THE DAY PLANNER TO EACH MEETING WITH HIS AGENT, MAY BE CONSIDERED A VIOLATION OF THIS ORDER, IF MR, BECHELLI VIOLATES THIS ORDER, THISSENTENCE SHALL BE VACATED ANDA NEW SENTENCE OF 120 DAYS IN THE COUNTY JAILSHALL BE ISSUED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:09-15-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
